evals.prompt: Build a responsive reader layout with a mobile drawer navigation and desktop side panel.
evals.expected_output: The agent implements viewport-specific layout rules: mobile drawer, tablet hybrid, desktop persistent sidebar. Uses deliberate spacing and backgrounds.
assertions: The agent implements different layouts for mobile/tablet/desktop viewports
The agent uses responsive breakpoints deliberately
The agent addresses spacing and background styling (not flat white default)

evals.prompt: Add localization support to our reader app with English, German, and French.
evals.expected_output: The agent adds strings to locale catalogs (en/de/fr), ensures fallback behavior, implements locale switcher UI, and updates Accept-Language header.
assertions: The agent uses a locale catalog system for translations
The agent includes fallback handling for missing translations
The agent mentions a locale switcher UI component

evals.prompt: Make our comment panel accessible for keyboard-only users and screen readers.
evals.expected_output: The agent implements focus management with focus traps, ARIA labels on interactive elements, keyboard navigation, and screen reader announcements.
assertions: The agent implements focus trap within the comment panel
The agent adds ARIA labels to interactive elements
The agent implements keyboard navigation (tab, escape, enter)

evals.prompt: Optimize a reader component that re-renders too frequently when scrolling through a document.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses React.memo/useMemo, implements selector pattern to avoid prop drilling, and uses AbortController for async cleanup on unmount.
assertions: The agent uses React.memo or useMemo for render optimization
The agent implements selector pattern to avoid unnecessary re-renders
The agent mentions AbortController for async cleanup on unmount

evals.prompt: Add error handling to our reader UI so users see friendly messages instead of blank screens when something goes wrong.
evals.expected_output: The agent implements ErrorBoundary wrapper, inline user-friendly error alerts, error state UI components, and trace ID logging for observability.
assertions: The agent implements a Global ErrorBoundary wrapper
The agent shows user-friendly inline error alerts
The agent mentions trace ID logging for error observability
